theme.name: Theme
theme.template:
{lang="gdcatalog_feeds_title"}

#
{lang="gdcatalog_feed_name"}
{lang="gdcatalog_feed_distributor"}
{lang="gdcatalog_feed_format"}
{lang="gdcatalog_feed_schedule"}
{lang="gdcatalog_feed_active"}
{lang="gdcatalog_feed_last_run"}
{lang="gdcatalog_feed_last_count"}
{lang="gdcatalog_feed_last_status"}
{{foreach $feeds as $feed}}
{$feed->priority}
{$feed->feed_name}
{lang="gdcatalog_dist_{$feed->distributor}"}
{expression="strtoupper( $feed->feed_format )"}
{$feed->import_schedule}
{{if $feed->active}} {lang="gdcatalog_feed_active"} {{else}} Inactive {{endif}}
{{if $feed->last_run}} {datetime="$feed->last_run"} {{else}} — {{endif}}
{expression="number_format( $feed->last_record_count )"}
{{if $feed->last_run_status === 'completed'}} OK {{elseif $feed->last_run_status === 'failed'}} Failed {{elseif $feed->last_run_status === 'running'}} Running {{else}} — {{endif}}
id}" csrf="true"}" class="ipsButton ipsButton--small ipsButton--primary"> Edit
{{endforeach}}

{lang="gdcatalog_feeds_help"}

{lang="gdcatalog_conflicts_title"} ({expression="number_format( $total )"})

{{-- Filter bar --}}
{{-- Log table --}}
{lang="gdcatalog_conflict_upc"}
{lang="gdcatalog_conflict_field"}
{lang="gdcatalog_conflict_winner"}
{lang="gdcatalog_conflict_winner_val"}
{lang="gdcatalog_conflict_loser"}
{lang="gdcatalog_conflict_loser_val"}
{lang="gdcatalog_conflict_rule"}
{lang="gdcatalog_conflict_date"}
{{foreach $entries as $entry}}
{$entry['upc']}
{$entry['field_name']}
{$entry['winning_source']}
{expression="htmlspecialchars( mb_substr( $entry['winning_value'] ?? '', 0, 80 ) )"}
{$entry['losing_source']}
{expression="htmlspecialchars( mb_substr( $entry['losing_value'] ?? '', 0, 80 ) )"}
{$entry['rule_applied']}
{$entry['resolved_at']}
{{endforeach}} {{if count( $entries ) === 0}}
No conflict log entries found.
{{endif}}
{$pagination}

{$product->title} ({$product->upc})

{{-- Product meta --}}
Primary source: {$product->primary_source} | Sources: {$product->distributor_sources} | Last updated: {$product->last_updated} | Status: {{if $product->record_status === 'active'}} Active {{elseif $product->record_status === 'admin_review'}} Admin Review {{else}} {$product->record_status} {{endif}}
{{-- Locked fields summary --}} {{if count( $locks ) > 0}}
{lang="gdcatalog_product_locked_fields"}: {{foreach $locks as $lock}} {$lock->field_name} {{if $lock->isHardLock()}} (hard){{else}} (dist){{endif}} {{endforeach}}
{{endif}} {{-- Edit form --}} {$formHtml}

{lang="gdcatalog_compliance_title"}

{{-- Tab navigation --}}
{lang="gdcatalog_compliance_tab_new"} ({$counts['new']}) {lang="gdcatalog_compliance_tab_conflicts"} ({$counts['conflicts']}) {lang="gdcatalog_compliance_tab_locks"} ({$counts['locks']}) {lang="gdcatalog_compliance_tab_admin"} ({$counts['admin']})
{{-- Tab: New Restrictions --}} {{if $tab === 'new'}}
UPC
Type
Value
Distributor
First Seen
Actions
{{foreach $pendingFlags as $flag}}
{$flag->upc}
{$flag->flag_type}
{$flag->flag_value}
{$flag->distributor_id}
{$flag->first_seen_at}
id}" csrf="true"}" class="ipsButton ipsButton--small ipsButton--positive">{lang="gdcatalog_compliance_approve"} id}" csrf="true"}" class="ipsButton ipsButton--small ipsButton--negative">{lang="gdcatalog_compliance_reject"}
{{endforeach}} {{if count( $pendingFlags ) === 0}}
No pending restrictions.
{{endif}}
{{endif}} {{-- Tab: Feed Conflicts --}} {{if $tab === 'conflicts'}}
UPC
Field
Current
Incoming
Auto-resolve
Actions
{{foreach $pendingConflicts as $conflict}}
{$conflict->upc}
{$conflict->field_name}
{expression="htmlspecialchars( mb_substr( $conflict->current_value, 0, 60 ) )"}
{expression="htmlspecialchars( mb_substr( $conflict->incoming_value, 0, 60 ) )"}
{$conflict->auto_resolve_at}
id}" csrf="true"}" class="ipsButton ipsButton--small ipsButton--positive">{lang="gdcatalog_compliance_accept_incoming"} id}" csrf="true"}" class="ipsButton ipsButton--small ipsButton--warning">{lang="gdcatalog_compliance_keep_existing"} id}" csrf="true"}" class="ipsButton ipsButton--small ipsButton--normal">{lang="gdcatalog_compliance_set_custom"}
{{endforeach}} {{if count( $pendingConflicts ) === 0}}
No pending feed conflicts.
{{endif}}
{{endif}} {{-- Tab: Locked Fields --}} {{if $tab === 'locks'}}
UPC
Field
Locked Value
Type
Reason
Locked At
Actions
{{foreach $allLocks as $lock}}
{$lock->upc}
{$lock->field_name}
{expression="htmlspecialchars( mb_substr( $lock->locked_value, 0, 60 ) )"}
{{if $lock->isHardLock()}} {lang="gdcatalog_lock_type_hard"} {{else}} {lang="gdcatalog_lock_type_distributor"} {{endif}}
{expression="htmlspecialchars( mb_substr( $lock->lock_reason, 0, 80 ) )"}
{$lock->locked_at}
id}" csrf="true"}" class="ipsButton ipsButton--small ipsButton--negative" data-confirm>{lang="gdcatalog_lock_unlock"}
{{endforeach}} {{if count( $allLocks ) === 0}}
No locked fields.
{{endif}}
{{endif}} {{-- Tab: Admin Restrictions --}} {{if $tab === 'admin'}}
Add State Restriction
UPC
Scope
Type
Value
Set By
Date
Source
{{foreach $adminFlags as $flag}}
{$flag->upc}
{{if $flag->listing_id}}Listing{{else}}Product{{endif}}
{$flag->flag_type}
{$flag->flag_value}
{$flag->admin_reviewed_by}
{$flag->admin_reviewed_at}
{$flag->source}
{{endforeach}} {{if count( $adminFlags ) === 0}}
No admin-set restrictions.
{{endif}}
{{endif}}

{lang="gdcatalog_dash_title"}

{{-- Summary cards --}}

{lang="gdcatalog_dash_total_products"}

{expression="number_format( $totalProducts )"}
Active: {expression="number_format( $activeProducts )"} | Review: {expression="number_format( $reviewProducts )"}

{lang="gdcatalog_dash_opensearch_status"}

{{if $osExists}}
{expression="number_format( $osStats['doc_count'] )"}
{lang="gdcatalog_dash_opensearch_count"}
{{else}}
Index not found
{{endif}}

Pending Actions

Compliance flags: {$pendingCompliance}
Feed conflicts: {$pendingConflicts}
Locked fields: {$lockedFields}
Reindex queue: {$reindexQueue}
{{-- Action buttons --}}
{lang="gdcatalog_dash_rebuild_index"} {{if $reindexQueue > 0}} Process Reindex Queue ({$reindexQueue}) {{endif}}
{{-- Per-distributor stats --}}

{lang="gdcatalog_dash_by_distributor"}

#
{lang="gdcatalog_feed_distributor"}
Products
{lang="gdcatalog_feed_active"}
{lang="gdcatalog_dash_last_run"}
{lang="gdcatalog_dash_run_status"}
{lang="gdcatalog_dash_records_created"}
{lang="gdcatalog_dash_records_updated"}
{lang="gdcatalog_dash_records_errored"}
{{foreach $distributorStats as $ds}}
{$ds['feed']->priority}
{$ds['feed']->feed_name}
{expression="number_format( $ds['product_count'] )"}
{{if $ds['feed']->active}} Active {{else}} Inactive {{endif}}
{{if $ds['last_log']}} {$ds['last_log']['run_start']} {{else}} — {{endif}}
{{if $ds['last_log']}} {{if $ds['last_log']['status'] === 'completed'}} OK {{elseif $ds['last_log']['status'] === 'failed'}} Failed {{else}} Running {{endif}} {{else}} — {{endif}}
{expression="$ds['last_log'] ? $ds['last_log']['records_created'] : '—'"}
{expression="$ds['last_log'] ? $ds['last_log']['records_updated'] : '—'"}
{expression="$ds['last_log'] ? $ds['last_log']['records_errored'] : '—'"}
{{if $ds['feed']->active}} id}" csrf="true"}" class="ipsButton ipsButton--small ipsButton--primary" data-confirm> {lang="gdcatalog_dash_trigger_import"} {{endif}}
{{endforeach}}
{{-- Per-category counts --}}

{lang="gdcatalog_dash_by_category"}

{{foreach $categoryCounts as $cc}}
{$cc['name']}
{expression="number_format( $cc['count'] )"}
{{endforeach}}

{lang="gdcatalog_products_title"} ({expression="number_format( $total )"})

{{-- Search/filter bar --}}
{{-- Product table --}}
{lang="gdcatalog_product_upc"}
{lang="gdcatalog_product_title"}
{lang="gdcatalog_product_brand"}
{lang="gdcatalog_product_caliber"}
{lang="gdcatalog_product_msrp"}
{lang="gdcatalog_product_status"}
{lang="gdcatalog_product_primary_source"}
{{foreach $products as $product}}
{$product->upc}
{$product->title}
{$product->brand}
{$product->caliber}
{expression="$product->msrp ? '$' . number_format( (float) $product->msrp, 2 ) : '—'"}
{{if $product->record_status === 'active'}} {lang="gdcatalog_status_active"} {{elseif $product->record_status === 'admin_review'}} {lang="gdcatalog_status_admin_review"} {{elseif $product->record_status === 'discontinued'}} {lang="gdcatalog_status_discontinued"} {{else}} {lang="gdcatalog_status_pending"} {{endif}}
{$product->primary_source}
upc}"}" class="ipsButton ipsButton--small ipsButton--primary">Edit {{if $product->record_status === 'admin_review'}} upc}" csrf="true"}" class="ipsButton ipsButton--small ipsButton--positive">Approve {{endif}}
{{endforeach}}
{$pagination}
